scope.slice: M4-B.3 (/diagnostics page + startup capability-report log + Capabilities_Resolved_Through_Service architecture test + docs/capabilities.md + 4 bUnit page tests)
scope.branch: feature/T-026-m4-b-3-diagnostics-page-startup-log-and-architecture-test (created from main at the M4-B.2 closeout commit b1f0ec8; the M4-B.3 closeout commit feat(m4-b.3): add /diagnostics page, startup capability log, and Capabilities_Resolved_Through_Service architecture test is on this branch; the branch is fast-forwarded into main per the branching strategy rule 6; the branch is deleted per rule 7)
in_scope: Land the /diagnostics page at src/AiEng.Platform.App/Components/Pages/Diagnostics.razor (+ .razor.css). Page pattern mirrors the M2.4 Dashboard.razor: @page "/diagnostics"; @attribute [RouteMetadata("/diagnostics", "Diagnostics", Order = 4, ShowInSidebar = true, Icon = "◆", Description = "Detected host capabilities (tools, versions, provider credentials).")]; @layout AppLayout; @rendermode InteractiveServer; @inject IHostCapabilitiesService Service; @inject IPlatformInfo PlatformInfo. OnInitializedAsync calls Service.DetectAsync(); refresh button re-runs the call. Renders an AppPageHeader (title "Diagnostics", description, Actions slot with a Refresh AppButton testid refresh-diagnostics) and two AppCards (capability list + host metadata).

Add the startup capability-report log to src/AiEng.Platform.App/Program.cs. The block is inserted between app.Build() and the middleware pipeline. The block resolves IHostCapabilitiesService + ILogger<Program> from app.Services; uses a 10-second CancellationTokenSource; calls DetectAsync; logs the result at Information level with a single message including the DetectedAt timestamp + 6 tool statuses + 6 credential statuses. Wraps the call in a try/catch that logs failures at Warning level. The startup must not fail if capability detection fails.

Land the Capabilities_Resolved_Through_Service architecture test at tests/AiEng.Platform.ArchitectureTests/Capabilities/Capabilities_Resolved_Through_Service.cs (Active; not [Fact(Skip=...)]). Two [Fact] methods: (1) Diagnostics.razor contains @inject IHostCapabilitiesService and does not contain RunToCompletionAsync, ICredentialVault, or new SystemHostCapabilitiesService; (2) no .razor or .razor.cs file under src/AiEng.Platform.App/Components/Diagnostics/ contains any of the three forbidden tokens. The test is scoped to the Diagnostics folder to avoid the M4-A.2 Open Action false positive (AppProjectCard.razor is in App/Components/Projects/, not App/Components/Diagnostics/).

Land 4 bUnit tests at tests/AiEng.Platform.ComponentTests/Pages/DiagnosticsPageTests.cs. The tests use a private sealed FakeHostCapabilitiesService that records the DetectAsync call count and returns a configured HostCapabilities. The 4 tests: (1) OnInitializedAsync calls DetectAsync once; (2) the page renders 12 .app-capability-list-item entries; (3) the Refresh button re-runs DetectAsync (call count = 2); (4) the page renders the host metadata in the AppKeyValueList.
Land docs/capabilities.md (10 sections mirroring docs/infrastructure.md section 1-10: Goals, Project Structure, contract, records, components, page, composition root, tests, out of scope).

Update docs/design-system.md section 4.5: AppCapabilityList row from Planned (M4) to Implemented (M4-B.2); AppKeyValueList row from Planned (M4) to Implemented (M4-B.2). Resolves the M4-B.2 deferred decision.

Update the project-continuity state per Rule 15: session.json (this file), tasks.json (T-026 transitions Ready to InProgress to Done with the full evidence block; T-027 stub row added in Ready for the M4-B closeout), current.md (active slice updated; last stable commit updated; next recommended task updated), task-board.md (M4-B.3 row in Done Recently; T-027 stub row in Ready), milestones.json (M4-B.3 slice block from Planned to Done; top-level commits + handoffs + implementation_reports arrays updated), capabilities.json (C-015 + C-023 + C-024 evidence blocks finalised; top-level updated_at + updated_by_session updated; C-015 next_task cleared on close).
